pivHint: LOVE isn't just what a friend gives at all times in Proverbs 17. Sometimes it strikes the moment you meet someone - we call that LOVE at first _____.
winText: You found it. LOVE isn't just what a friend gives at all times - it's also part of the phrase "LOVE at first SIGHT," and that word is SIGHT.
lossText: The word was SIGHT. LOVE was the pivot - a friend's LOVE in Proverbs 17, and LOVE at first SIGHT.
votdVerse: A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity.
passageText: A friend loves at all times, and a brother is born for a time of adversity. One who has unreliable friends soon comes to ruin, but there is a friend who sticks closer than a brother.
